## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Datagrid and GrowthX to discuss content, SEO, and outbound marketing progress and strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/dDaL8ymFJVY4kxv4SVmEeynRuaCf579u?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production ramping up significantly: 15 articles published this week, 10 more by Saturday, 24 scheduled for next week](https://fathom.video/share/dDaL8ymFJVY4kxv4SVmEeynRuaCf579u?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [Early SEO success: Article on "how to data mine a PDF" ranking on first page within \~15 days](https://fathom.video/share/dDaL8ymFJVY4kxv4SVmEeynRuaCf579u?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Link building efforts underway through various channels, showing promising initial results](https://fathom.video/share/dDaL8ymFJVY4kxv4SVmEeynRuaCf579u?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [Outbound email campaigns scaling up to 2,000 emails/day, generating leads and insights on integration interests](https://fathom.video/share/dDaL8ymFJVY4kxv4SVmEeynRuaCf579u?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and SEO Progress

  - [15 articles published this week, 10 more by Saturday (25 total)](https://fathom.video/share/dDaL8ymFJVY4kxv4SVmEeynRuaCf579u?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [Content pillars: productivity tools, AI-powered automation, sales, document handling, software integrations, CRM connectors, insurance equipment handling](https://fathom.video/share/dDaL8ymFJVY4kxv4SVmEeynRuaCf579u?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Article on "how to data mine a PDF" ranking on first page within \~15 days](https://fathom.video/share/dDaL8ymFJVY4kxv4SVmEeynRuaCf579u?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [1,000 searches/month for this keyword, low difficulty](https://fathom.video/share/dDaL8ymFJVY4kxv4SVmEeynRuaCf579u?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Manual URL submission to Google for faster indexing; expect automatic indexing in \~2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/dDaL8ymFJVY4kxv4SVmEeynRuaCf579u?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [Positive signals for domain authority growth and faster ranking potential](https://fathom.video/share/dDaL8ymFJVY4kxv4SVmEeynRuaCf579u?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)

### Link Building Strategy

  - [Leveraging GrowthX's network of 25+ clients for backlink opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/dDaL8ymFJVY4kxv4SVmEeynRuaCf579u?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [Links already placed on sites like Firework, Attention, Pixis](https://fathom.video/share/dDaL8ymFJVY4kxv4SVmEeynRuaCf579u?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [Additional placements coming from news/information sites (e.g., tech-bullying)](https://fathom.video/share/dDaL8ymFJVY4kxv4SVmEeynRuaCf579u?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [Early results visible: increased backlinks (3 to 25+ in \~2 months) improving overall site authority](https://fathom.video/share/dDaL8ymFJVY4kxv4SVmEeynRuaCf579u?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)

### Outbound Marketing Campaigns

  - [Multiple campaigns running: marketing, sales exec, finance](https://fathom.video/share/dDaL8ymFJVY4kxv4SVmEeynRuaCf579u?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
  - [2,000 emails/day being sent](https://fathom.video/share/dDaL8ymFJVY4kxv4SVmEeynRuaCf579u?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
  - [Specific interest in Google tool integrations (Analytics, Search Console, Ads)](https://fathom.video/share/dDaL8ymFJVY4kxv4SVmEeynRuaCf579u?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
  - [Low bounce rates, varying click-through rates](https://fathom.video/share/dDaL8ymFJVY4kxv4SVmEeynRuaCf579u?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
  - [Recommendation to create specific landing pages/content for popular integration requests](https://fathom.video/share/dDaL8ymFJVY4kxv4SVmEeynRuaCf579u?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)

### Campaign Feedback Loop

  - [Thiago to provide qualitative feedback on successful use cases via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/dDaL8ymFJVY4kxv4SVmEeynRuaCf579u?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
  - [Consider creating campaigns for manufacturing and AI enablement audiences](https://fathom.video/share/dDaL8ymFJVY4kxv4SVmEeynRuaCf579u?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
  - [Need to set up separate email inbox for inbound responses to simplify filtering and follow-up](https://fathom.video/share/dDaL8ymFJVY4kxv4SVmEeynRuaCf579u?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)

### Content Creation for Lead Nurturing

  - [Suggestion to create targeted content (articles, videos) addressing common questions from leads](https://fathom.video/share/dDaL8ymFJVY4kxv4SVmEeynRuaCf579u?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)
  - [Focus on topics like Google Analytics and Ads integrations](https://fathom.video/share/dDaL8ymFJVY4kxv4SVmEeynRuaCf579u?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Set up separate email inbox for inbound campaign responses](https://fathom.video/share/dDaL8ymFJVY4kxv4SVmEeynRuaCf579u?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
  - [Thiago to send email inbox details to Jimmy for setup](https://fathom.video/share/dDaL8ymFJVY4kxv4SVmEeynRuaCf579u?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)
  - [Create more targeted content around popular integration requests (e.g., Google Analytics, Ads)](https://fathom.video/share/dDaL8ymFJVY4kxv4SVmEeynRuaCf579u?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)
  - [Continue ramping up content production and link building efforts](https://fathom.video/share/dDaL8ymFJVY4kxv4SVmEeynRuaCf579u?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Finalize co-promotion strategy and implement coupon code with credits](https://fathom.video/share/dDaL8ymFJVY4kxv4SVmEeynRuaCf579u?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [Monitor and report on early SEO and backlink results](https://fathom.video/share/dDaL8ymFJVY4kxv4SVmEeynRuaCf579u?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
